title: wedelia serrata
intro: Wedelia serrata, also known as the serrated wedelia or the Indian callistemon, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of India and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. The leaves and flowers of the Wedelia serrata plant are commonly used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be prepared by steeping the plant material in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
